name: Freshworks
description: Customer engagement software suite including Freshdesk, Freshsales, Freshservice, and Freshmarketer for 50K+ businesses
pros: Founded by Indian entrepreneur Girish Mathrubootham in Chennai
Easy-to-use interface compared to Salesforce and Zendesk
Free tier available for small teams (Freshdesk, Freshsales)
3,800 of 4,500 employees based in India (Chennai, Bangalore, Hyderabad)
cons: Delaware incorporated, NASDAQ listed — legally a US company
Founder Girish Mathrubootham stepped down Dec 2025, new American CEO
60-day cancellation notice required — restrictive billing practices
userComplaints: Billing practices criticized — 60-day cancellation notice without renewal reminders
Customer support can be slow for non-enterprise plans
Email function has high bounce rates and image upload issues
